channel.title: Claude Developer Misery Index
channel.description: Real-time Claude AI reliability tracking — misery score, API status, and incident alerts. Updated every 15 minutes.

item.title: Misery Index: 3.0/10 — MINOR GRUMBLING
item.description: Score: 3.0/10 (MINOR GRUMBLING). Status: All Systems Operational.

item.title: [NONE] Elevated errors on Opus 4.6
item.description: Status: investigating. Impact: none. Latest: We are currently investigating this issue.

item.title: [MINOR] Errors uploading documents to Google Drive in Claude.ai
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: The issue affecting uploads to Google Drive has been resolved.

item.title: [MINOR] Failures to add Credentials to Vaults
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [MAJOR] Claude Cowork not starting for some users
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: major. Latest: This incident has been resolved in the v1.3109.0 release of Claude Desktop. Please "Check for Updates".

item.title: [MINOR] Opus 4.6 elevated rate of errors
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: Earlier today we had an outage on Opus 4.6 that started at 23:03 PT / 6:03 UTC and ended at 00:26 PT / 7:26 UTC.
